problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
